influencer_type: Nano travel lifestyle influencer with food/luxury focus. Multi-platform presence on Instagram, TikTok, Facebook.
summary: CrazyRichNomad has 5,600 Instagram followers and produces luxury travel/food content across Asia-Pacific. TikTok shows stronger engagement (95-305 likes, 2.5K-7.4K views) while Instagram has concerning hidden likes data limiting ROI assessment.
